body:
🌙 Dark GUI PvP Resource Pack

Dark GUI PvP is a clean and minimal resource pack that replaces the default Minecraft interface with a dark, modern GUI for better focus and comfort.

The dark theme reduces eye strain, looks sleek, and pairs perfectly with PvP gameplay where clarity matters most.

Features:

🌙 Dark GUI for menus, inventories, and screens

👁️ Easier on the eyes during long sessions

⚔️ PvP-friendly design with clean visuals

🚀 Lightweight and FPS-friendly

🎮 Compatible with most PvP servers

Why Dark GUI?

Cleaner look than default UI

Better contrast for items and text

Ideal for PvP, SMP, and Survival

Perfect for players who want a modern, distraction-free Minecraft interface.
